title: Stay up to date with ONR regulatory guidance
text:
Stay up to date with ONR regulatory guidance


            10 March 2026
        

We publish regulatory guidance to support transparency and help you understand how we carry out our work.

You can now receive updates directly to your email inbox by subscribing to our RSS feed. This means you'll be notified whenever we publish new or updated guidance, without needing to check our website manually.

How to subscribe

Most email applications, including Microsoft Outlook, allow you to subscribe to RSS feeds. Once set up, new publications will appear automatically.

Add our RSS feed to your email client or feed reader using this URL:

https://www.onr.org.uk/rss-publications

 

Guidance

Add an RSS feed to Outlook [Microsoft]

Find out about our other RSS feeds

About our regulatory guidance

The guidance we publish reflects the internal instructions used by ONR staff in our day-to-day operational work. We provide additional explanation where helpful, and all open material is available on our website.

Documents that have passed their review date remain subject to our review processes and will be updated in due course.

Need help?

If you have feedback on our guidance or any part of our website, please contact us through our 
website feedback form
.
